falsification_conditions.condition: The price rises by more than 15% from the current level within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward move would contradict the HOLD signal, suggesting a bullish breakout rather than a consolidation phase.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases above 60 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would indicate extreme overbought conditions, invalidating the current HOLD by signaling an imminent reversal or crash.

falsification_conditions.condition: Volume surges to 200% above the 20-day average within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A massive volume spike would confirm a decisive market move (either bullish or bearish), directly contradicting the current uncertainty and HOLD signal.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
